enter.speaker: narrator
enter.text: The inn is warm. Wood-smoke, day-old bread, a fire the color of regret. A slim man at the counter sets his ledger down as you approach, and his smile is polite enough to be nothing at all.

hello.speaker: tomas
hello.text: Welcome to the Whispering Hollow. The name is older than the inn, in case anyone has told you otherwise. What will it be — a bed, a meal, or just the fire?

choices.text: I have the moonpetals you asked for.
I'm looking for a scholar. An Elven man, Veyrin.

herb-offer.speaker: tomas
herb-offer.text: The healer left town two months ago. I have been making do with what poultices I can manage, but I am running low on moonpetals. They grow in the woods and the depths — pale things, purple-edged. Three would last me through the season.

herb-accept.speaker: tomas
herb-accept.text: I will pay what I can. It is not much, but it is more than the petals would fetch on the road. Be careful where you pick them — they grow in places that are quiet for a reason.

herb-turnin.speaker: tomas
herb-turnin.text: Three moonpetals. Still fresh. You have done me a kindness, and I do not forget kindnesses. They are too rare in this town to waste.

herb-done.speaker: tomas
herb-done.text: Thirty-five gold, and my thanks. The fire and a bed are yours whenever you need them. No charge, for tonight.

bed.speaker: tomas
bed.text: Ten gold for a night. Twelve if you want the east room — it has the window that does not stick. A hot meal is included either way.

regulars.speaker: tomas
regulars.text: Fewer, these past months. Mostly adventurers now. The merchants stopped coming when the Greenhollow road went quiet. Some of the rooms are still held for those who paid ahead and have not come back to sleep in them.

veyrin.speaker: tomas
veyrin.text: Veyrin. Quiet man. Paid in moonlight silver, once, which I took because he asked kindly. Walked out one morning toward the woods and said he would be back by supper. His bed is still made. I keep his room for him. Call it a habit.

veyrin-offer.speaker: tomas
veyrin-offer.text: If you find him — or find what is left of him — I would like to know. I keep the room either way. I would just like to stop setting out the tea.

leave.speaker: tomas
leave.text: As you like. The fire will be here. So will I.

hire-tomas.speaker: tomas
hire-tomas.text: Sixty gold. I have some field medicine — not much, but enough to keep a wound from ending you between blows. I have done it before, in harder times than these.

hire-tomas-confirm.speaker: tomas
hire-tomas-confirm.text: I will leave the inn to Marta. She manages better than she lets on. Let us go before I reconsider.
